title: Dananir
actors: Abdel Aziz Ahmad, Yehia Chahine, Mansi Fahmi
plot: Ja'far Al-Barmaki hears the Bedouin Dananir singing while passing through the desert. He asks her to accompany him to Baghdad where she sings in front of the Harun Al-Rashid, but the plots against Ja'far turn Harun against him.
